texto: There are those who maintain that in this world women have no right to interfere in the affairs of state, in politics, in plots and counter-plots. Others that are who, more chivalrous, are willing to admit that women have as much right to act, think, and speak as men.
explicacao: Citação de Belle Boyd sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are those who maintain that in this world women have no right to interfere in the affairs o…” articula reflexao, women, men em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como men e world.

texto: If it is a crime to love the South, its cause and its President, then I am a criminal. I would rather lie down in this prison and die than leave it owing allegiance to a government such as yours.
explicacao: Citação de Belle Boyd sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “If it is a crime to love the South, its cause and its President, then I am a criminal. I would ra…” articula amor, love, i-am em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como i-am e lie.
